name: Checkout Review
notes: Razor Page. PageModel: CheckoutModel.
Auth: [Authorize] — authenticated users only; unauthenticated users redirected to login.
Loads basket via IBasketViewModelService.GetOrCreateBasketForUser(username) on OnGet; uses SignInManager to determine if user is authenticated, falls back to BASKET_COOKIENAME cookie.

OnPost(IEnumerable<BasketItemViewModel>) — updates quantities via IBasketService.SetQuantities, creates order via IOrderService.CreateOrderAsync (shipping address currently hardcoded: 123 Main St., Kent, OH, United States, 44240), deletes basket via IBasketService.DeleteBasketAsync; redirects to /basket/success.
On EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException: logs warning, redirects to /basket/index.
On ModelState invalid: returns HTTP 400 BadRequest.
Empty-state: 'Basket is empty.' with no form when BasketModel.Items is empty.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 page component at /basket/checkout; route guarded by Angular AuthGuard + Spring Security .authenticated() on endpoint; IBasketService and IOrderService become Spring @Service beans; order creation via Spring @RestController @PostMapping("/api/orders")

name: Order Review Form
notes: POST form. asp-page='Checkout' submits to /basket/checkout default OnPost handler.
Rendered only when BasketModel.Items is non-empty.
Fields: Items[i].Id (hidden, int) and Items[i].Quantity (hidden, int) per row — quantities are not editable on this page.
Validation: ModelState.IsValid checked server-side; returns HTTP 400 on failure.
On success: basket deleted, redirects to /basket/success.
javaEquivalent: Angular reactive form with hidden FormArray carrying item IDs and quantities; on (ngSubmit) calls Angular OrderService HTTP POST to Spring @RestController @PostMapping("/api/orders"); on success Angular Router navigates to /basket/success

name: Checkout Items Table
notes: Renders one row per BasketItemViewModel in BasketModel.Items via @for loop (indexed for model binding).

Columns: Product image (hidden on screens below lg), Product name, Unit price ($ N2), Quantity (read-only text display; Items[i].Id and Items[i].Quantity posted as hidden fields), Line total (Quantity × UnitPrice, $ N2, computed in template).
Footer row: 'Total' label and BasketModel.Total() ($ N2).
Quantities are review-only — not editable on this page.
javaEquivalent: Angular 19 read-only component with @for over basketItems; quantities shown as text; hidden inputs managed by FormArray; total rendered via component method; data loaded from Angular BasketService

name: Pay Now Button
notes: Submit input. Triggers default OnPost handler.
OnPost: calls IBasketService.SetQuantities, then IOrderService.CreateOrderAsync with hardcoded shipping address, then IBasketService.DeleteBasketAsync.
On success: redirects to /basket/success.
On EmptyBasketOnCheckoutException: redirects to /basket/index.
On ModelState invalid: returns HTTP 400 BadRequest (no user-facing error rendered).
javaEquivalent: Angular (ngSubmit) calls Angular OrderService HTTP POST /api/orders with basket item payload; Spring @RestController @PostMapping("/api/orders") creates order and clears basket; on success Angular Router navigates to /basket/success
